# Support

This is a hobby project maintained by **one person** in their spare time -
there's no support team and no guaranteed response window. Here's the fastest
way to get unstuck.

## Before anything else

Check the docs. Most questions are already answered there:

- **[Full documentation](https://locko2901.github.io/lastfm-to-ytm/)**
- **[Quick Start (Docker)](https://locko2901.github.io/lastfm-to-ytm/quickstart/)**
- **[Troubleshooting](https://locko2901.github.io/lastfm-to-ytm/troubleshooting/)** - auth errors, playlists not updating, wrong matches, rate limits, and more.
- **[Configuration](https://locko2901.github.io/lastfm-to-ytm/configuration/)** - every setting explained.

## Where to go

| You want to… | Go to |
|---|---|
| Ask "how do I…" or general usage help | [Discussions](https://github.com/Locko2901/lastfm-to-ytm/discussions) |
| Report a bug | [Open a bug report](https://github.com/Locko2901/lastfm-to-ytm/issues/new?template=bug_report.yml) |
| Suggest a feature | [Open a feature request](https://github.com/Locko2901/lastfm-to-ytm/issues/new?template=feature_request.yml) |
| Report a security issue | [Private vulnerability reporting](https://github.com/Locko2901/lastfm-to-ytm/security/advisories/new) (see [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md)) |

## Helping me help you

When you do reach out, include what you tried, what happened, what you expected,
and relevant logs from the sync console or `./run-docker.sh --logs` - with any
**secrets redacted**. A good report gets a good answer faster.

Please be patient and kind. Fixes and replies happen when time allows.
